description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a combination of white, gold, and black finishes. The body is primarily constructed from metal, with a polymer stock and grip for ergonomic handling. The handguard is vented and extends nearly the full length of the barrel, which is capped with a gold-colored muzzle device. The rifle is equipped with iron sights and a detachable box magazine, both of which are standard for urban tactical firearms. The stock is collapsible, allowing for adjustable length to suit different users or storage needs. Overall, the rifle's design suggests a focus on both functionality and visual appeal, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern, white and gold tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, iron sights, and a detachable box magazine. The design blends metal and polymer components for durability and ergonomic use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle device, barrel, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and full-length handguard.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the back of the receiver, with the magazine and grip visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the ejection port, magazine release, and additional details of the handguard and stock.
